bandit_issues: By default, jinja2 sets autoescape to False. Consider using autoescape=True or use the select_autoescape function to mitigate XSS vulnerabilities.; Call to requests without timeout; Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.; Probable insecure usage of temp file/directory.; Starting a process with a shell, possible injection detected, security issue.
